name: Organic Bananas
description: Sweet, ripe organic bananas. Perfect for smoothies, baking, or a quick healthy snack on the go.

name: Fresh Strawberries
description: Hand-picked ripe strawberries bursting with flavor. Great for desserts, salads, or eating fresh.

name: Shimla Apples
description: Crisp and sweet Shimla apples. A classic favorite for lunchboxes and afternoon snacking.

name: Avocados
description: Perfectly ripe Hass avocados. Creamy texture ideal for guacamole, toast, or salads.

name: Alphonso Mangoes
description: Premium Ratnagiri Alphonso mangoes with rich, sweet flavor. The king of fruits.

name: Baby Spinach
description: Tender baby spinach leaves, washed and ready to cook. Great for palak paneer and salads.

name: Cherry Tomatoes
description: Sweet vine-ripened cherry tomatoes. Perfect for salads, pasta, and snacking.

name: Organic Broccoli
description: Fresh organic broccoli crowns. Packed with vitamins and perfect for stir-fries and steaming.

name: Capsicum Mix
description: Colorful trio of red, yellow, and green capsicums. Crunchy and sweet for any dish.

name: Fresh Carrots
description: Crunchy Ooty carrots. Perfect for snacking, juicing, halwa, or roasting.

name: Amul Full Cream Milk
description: Farm-fresh full cream milk. Rich, creamy, and full of natural goodness.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick and creamy plain Greek yogurt. High in protein, perfect with fruits and granola.

name: Amul Cheese Block
description: Processed cheese block with rich, smooth flavour. Perfect for sandwiches and parathas.

name: Farm Fresh Eggs
description: Free-range eggs from local farms. Rich yolks perfect for any meal.

name: Amul Butter
description: Utterly butterly delicious Amul butter. Perfect for parathas, toast, and cooking.

name: Sourdough Bread
description: Artisan sourdough with a crispy crust and tangy, chewy interior. Freshly baked daily.

name: Chocolate Croissants
description: Buttery, flaky croissants filled with rich dark chocolate. Perfect for breakfast.

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: Soft, fluffy muffins loaded with juicy blueberries and a crumbly sugar top.

name: Whole Wheat Roti
description: Soft whole wheat rotis, ready to heat and eat. Perfect for quick meals.

name: Cinnamon Rolls
description: Warm, gooey cinnamon rolls with cream cheese frosting. A weekend morning treat.

name: Real Orange Juice
description: Freshly squeezed, not-from-concentrate orange juice. Pure sunshine in every glass.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Smooth, low-acid cold brew made from single-origin beans. Bold and refreshing.

name: Green Tea
description: Premium green tea bags. Delicate flavour with natural antioxidants.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Refreshing naturally carbonated mineral water. Zero calories, pure hydration.

name: Almond Milk
description: Unsweetened vanilla almond milk. Creamy plant-based alternative for cereal and coffee.

name: Mixed Dry Fruits
description: Premium roasted and salted mixed dry fruits — almonds, cashews, pistachios, and walnuts.

name: Dark Chocolate Bar
description: 72% cacao dark chocolate. Rich, smooth, and slightly bitter with intense flavour.

name: Organic Granola
description: Crunchy organic granola with honey, oats, and dried cranberries. Great with yogurt.

name: Veggie Chips
description: Crispy baked vegetable chips made from sweet potatoes, beets, and taro. Lightly salted.

name: Trail Mix
description: Energy-packed trail mix with peanuts, raisins, sunflower seeds, and almonds.
